title: Admins should be able to view which external apps/integrations are in account
excerpt: Admins should be able to view which external tools are integrated with their account, and what boards have active integrations in one place.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Admins should be able to view which external tools are integrated with their account, and what boards have active integrations in one place.
